tickers.what_it_does: Expand Energy: large US gas producer; cheap producer exposure to higher HH with lower oil beta.
Vistra: power generator; gas-fired capacity beneficiary of power demand surge, less direct LNG linkage.
Range Resources: low-leverage Appalachia gas producer; cleaner balance sheet, lower LNG-spread directness.
Antero Resources: Appalachia gas/NGL producer; liquids-rich with LNG export upside.
EQT: largest US gas producer; Appalachia scale operator, high leverage to HH price.
Coterra: gas-weighted E&P with Permian/Appalachia mix; lower leverage, more balanced producer exposure.
Cheniere: operating LNG exporter; contracted liquefaction fees plus spot/marketing upside to JKM-HH spreads.
Antero Midstream: Appalachia gathering/processing MLP; tied to AR volumes, high yield.
MPLX: large midstream MLP; Permian/Marcellus gathering, stable distributions, lower spread beta.
ONEOK: NGL/gas midstream; more levered and less clean than TRGP/ET for this specific thesis.
Flex LNG: modern TFDE/X-DF LNG carrier fleet; direct shipping rate exposure to tonne-mile demand and JKM/TTF arbitrage flows.
Energy Transfer: diversified midstream MLP; Permian gas takeaway, intrastate pipes, NGL, fractionation, exports.
Venture Global: LNG exporter/developer; maximum LNG torque with high leverage/legal-contract overhang.
Kinder Morgan: giant gas pipeline tollbooth; GCX/Permian Highway/Tennessee Gas/Trident LNG feedgas exposure.
Williams: Transco gas pipe owner; LNG/feedgas and Southeast power-demand tollbooth.
DT Midstream: gas pipes/storage with Haynesville/Gulf Coast exposure; smaller midstream compounder.
